## Checklist

- [ ] `swift build` passes
- [ ] `swift test` passes
- [ ] New decision logic (safety rails / rules / formatting) has unit tests
- [ ] Stays honest: no private APIs, no root, no network, no telemetry
- [ ] Respects the safety rails if it touches the sleep-decision path
- [ ] Docs / `CHANGELOG.md` updated if behavior changed
